title: Immigrate through the Atlantic Immigration Program: Who can apply - Canada.ca
content:
To apply for permanent residence under this program, you must:
- get a valid job offer from a designated employer
- have qualifying work experience You might be exempt if you recently graduated from a recognized post-secondary institution in Atlantic Canada.
- You might be exempt if you recently graduated from a recognized post-secondary institution in Atlantic Canada.
- have the right level of education for the job you’re offered
- prove your language abilities by taking an approved test
- show that you have enough money to support yourself and your family when you get to Canada If you’re already living and working in Canada with a valid work permit, you don’t need to show proof.
- If you’re already living and working in Canada with a valid work permit, you don’t need to show proof.
- get a settlement plan from a service provider organization

Thank you for your feedback.
